---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability that would improve the research platform or maintainer workflow.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What capability do you want to add?

## Why it matters

What workflow, failure mode, or experiment does this unlock?

## Proposed shape

Describe the simplest version that would already be useful.

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?
